covid_surveillance.short_description: Weekly covid surveillance data from Texas Department of State Health Services
covid_surveillance.long_description: Texas Department of State Health Services collects and reports covid surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

influenza_surveillance.short_description: Weekly influenza surveillance data from Texas Department of State Health Services
influenza_surveillance.long_description: Texas Department of State Health Services collects and reports influenza surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

rsv_surveillance.short_description: Weekly rsv surveillance data from Texas Department of State Health Services
rsv_surveillance.long_description: Texas Department of State Health Services collects and reports rsv surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

tx_dph.name: Texas Department of State Health Services
tx_dph.organization: Texas Department of State Health Services
tx_dph.description: Texas Department of State Health Services provides weekly respiratory surveillance data for Texas covering pathogens including: covid, influenza, rsv . Data is published via state health department dashboards and reports. Temporal coverage: ~2019-ongoing. Geographic coverage: state level.
tx_dph.restrictions: Public domain state government health data.
